title: Safa Eden ready for women's National Championship play-offs
description: KNYSNA NEWS - Safa Eden Region president...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - Safa Eden Region president Siyabonga Chris Tyhawana says preparations are on track for the women's National Championship play-offs, to take place in Knysna from 15 to 20 October.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - Safa Eden Region president Siyabonga Chris Tyhawana says preparations are on track for the women's National Championship play-offs, to take place in Knysna from 15 to 20 October."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"The preparations are going very well, and let's not forget to thank the Knysna municipality for their commitment to this big event.","html":"\"The preparations are going very well, and let's not forget to thank the Knysna municipality for their commitment to this big event."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"It will be the first time that the town of Knysna hosts such an exciting event,\" Tyhawana said.","html":"\"It will be the first time that the town of Knysna hosts such an exciting event,\" Tyhawana said."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"Thank you to Safa Western Cape for entrusting my region with such a great event.\"","html":"\"Thank you to Safa Western Cape for entrusting my region with such a great event.\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Loerie Park Sports Grounds","html":"Loerie Park Sports Grounds"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"This year’s play-offs will take place at Knysna's Loerie Park Sports Grounds.","html":"This year’s play-offs will take place at Knysna's Loerie Park Sports Grounds."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"Teams will be battling it out for the top two positions - eyeing gaining promotion to the National Hollywoodbets Women's League,\" Tyhawana said.","html":"\"Teams will be battling it out for the top two positions - eyeing gaining promotion to the National Hollywoodbets Women's League,\" Tyhawana said."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"The teams are, Group A - Ramatlaohli Ladies (Limpopo), Super Strikers (Mpumalanga), FC Raycon Ladies (Gauteng).","html":"\"The teams are, Group A - Ramatlaohli Ladies (Limpopo), Super Strikers (Mpumalanga), FC Raycon Ladies (Gauteng)."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"Group B - Kovsies (Free State), Royal Wizards (Northern Cape). Group C - Sophakama Ladies (Eastern Cape), the host team University of Cape Town (Western Cape) and Ezemvelo Ladies (KwaZulu-Natal).\"","html":"\"Group B - Kovsies (Free State), Royal Wizards (Northern Cape). Group C - Sophakama Ladies (Eastern Cape), the host team University of Cape Town (Western Cape) and Ezemvelo Ladies (KwaZulu-Natal).\""},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Tyhawana said the teams would arrive in Knysna on Monday 14 October."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He said further on the national play-offs taking place in the Eden Region: \"This is what the region needs more of when it comes to women's football - the district is sitting with many challenges, of women's clubs wanting to quit due to the financial burdens and constraints.\"","html":"He said further on the national play-offs taking place in the Eden Region: \"This is what the region needs more of when it comes to women's football - the district is sitting with many challenges, of women's clubs wanting to quit due to the financial burdens and constraints.\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Safa Eden ready for women's National Championship play-offs
